creator: trevor@jpj.net
text:
This port provides an American English, male voice, sampled at 16 kHz, for
Festival. It depends on the festival (ports/21182), festlex-poslex
(ports/21186), and festlex-cmu (ports/21184) ports. This is based on the
NetBSD port.  Please retain the line saying so, and the $NetBSD$ RCS tags,
when committing it.

Fix: 

http://jpj.net/~trevor/freebsd/ports/festvox-kal16.shar
How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
